solar-system.title: The Solar System
solar-system.subtitle: Inner planets orbit fastest - Kepler III, T squared proportional to a cubed. Distances and body sizes are compressed to fit; the orbital rates match the radii drawn here, not the true AU scale.

atom.title: Carbon: the Bohr Model
atom.subtitle: 6 protons and 6 neutrons in a glowing nucleus - 2 electrons in the K shell, 4 in the L shell - and one excited electron falling back from n=3, releasing a photon

objects.text: 4 valence electrons in the L shell  -  carbon forms 4 bonds
M shell   n = 3   -   empty in the ground state
photon emitted    E = h f = E3 - E2
not to scale - a real nucleus is about 100000 times smaller than the atom
Bohr model - shell radii and speeds are compressed; real electrons occupy orbitals, not rings

dna.title: DNA double helix
dna.subtitle: Two antiparallel sugar-phosphate backbones wound right-handed about a common axis, rungged by complementary base pairs: 10 bp per 3.4 nm turn, 2 nm across

objects.text: RANGE  R = v0^2 sin(2a) / g = 19.98 m
g = 9.81 m/s2 pulls down at every instant
x = v0 cos(a) t      y = v0 sin(a) t - 0.5 g t^2

pendulum.title: The Simple Pendulum
pendulum.subtitle: Pivot, rigid rod, swinging bob: length L, amplitude theta0, restoring force and the KE-PE exchange

objects.text: Lowest point: v max, KE max
forces drawn at the lowest point
at 30 deg the true T is 5.40 s

wave.title: Transverse Sine Wave
wave.subtitle: Read wavelength, amplitude and frequency straight off the curve

objects.text: the same wave, a moment later
measured from the rest line to a peak
trough to trough is the same 8 m
dots one wavelength apart move in phase
one turn = one cycle = period T
y = A sin(2 pi x / wavelength)
TRANSVERSE: each particle moves up and down, the wave moves sideways

water-molecule.title: Water (H2O) - a bent, polar molecule
water-molecule.subtitle: One oxygen, two hydrogens, two lone pairs, a 104.5 degree bond angle and the hydrogen bond that follows from it

magnetic-field.title: The Field of a Bar Magnet
magnetic-field.subtitle: Field lines leave the north pole face, loop through space into the south pole, and close S to N inside the iron

objects.text: outside the magnet: B runs N to S
lines crowd at the poles: field is strongest
inside the magnet: B runs S to N
every line is a closed loop: no monopoles
a compass needle turns to lie along the local B
